Concept_Description: MFA Provider MUST be available for Finance Team to enforce step-up authentication.
MFA Enrollment MUST be enforced for all users accessing Finance Team without exception.
Trusts that MFA tokens are provisioned before users need access to Finance Team.
Assumes that MFA factor is not interceptable via phishing for Finance Team.
SSO MUST be enforced for all application access through Finance Team without exception.
SSO Provider MUST be available to authenticate users at Finance Team.
Assumes that SSO sessions are properly scoped and timed at Finance Team.
Trusts that SSO identity provider assertions are cryptographically verified at Finance Team.
Auto-scaling MUST be available for ERP Web App to handle peak load without degradation.
Architecturally requires replica failover for Financial DB to maintain availability.
Assumes that Finance Team is deployed across multiple availability zones.
Network path redundancy MUST be tested for failover scenarios involving SOX Enclave.
Backup schedule MUST be tested via restore drill for Financial DB at least quarterly.
Backup storage MUST be available for Financial DB in a separate geographic region.
Assumes that Finance Team backup data is not silently corrupted.
Change approval MUST be documented and approved before deployment to ERP Web App.
Changes MUST be tested in a staging environment before promoting to Finance Team.
Assumes that changes to SOX Enclave do not bypass security controls.
IAM roles MUST be enforced with least-privilege for ERP Web App.

Concept_ID: CLOUD-IAM.IAM Policy Review for Finance Team
Concept_Description: Assumes that IAM policies attached to Finance Team do not grant unintended access.
Trusts that IAM roles assumed by Finance Team are scoped to trusted entities.

Concept_ID: CLOUD-IAM.Service Control Policies for region restriction
Concept_Description: SCPs MUST be available to prevent actions on ERP Web App outside approved regions.
Assumes that data flowing to Financial DB is properly classified by sensitivity.

Concept_ID: DATAFLOW.Data Flow Mapping for SOX Enclave
Concept_Description: Data flow MUST be documented for all data paths through SOX Enclave.

Concept_ID: DATAFLOW.Data Leak Prevention for ERP Web App
Concept_Description: DLP MUST be enforced to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration from ERP Web App.
Assumes that Finance Team validates all data schemas before processing.

Concept_ID: ENCR-REST.Encryption Key AES-256 at rest for Financial DB
Concept_Description: AES-256 encryption MUST be enforced for all data stored in Financial DB.
Assumes that encryption keys for Financial DB are rotated on schedule.
Key access control MUST be available via KMS with strict access controls for Finance Team.
TLS 1.2+ MUST be enforced for all connections to Finance Team.
Assumes that TLS certificates for Finance Team are renewed before expiry.
Trusts that the CA chain for SOX Enclave has not been compromised.
mTLS MUST be tested to verify correct configuration for ERP Web App.
Assumes that personnel accessing Finance Team have completed security awareness training.
IR procedures MUST be documented for incidents involving ERP Web App.
Assumes that users of Finance Team do not share credentials or bypass security controls.
Users MUST be provisioned in Finance Team within 24 hours of hire.
Access to Finance Team MUST be deactivated within 1 hour of termination.
Quarterly access review MUST be documented for Finance Team.

Concept_ID: ID-LIFECYCLE.HR system as identity source of truth
Concept_Description: Trusts that the HR system feeds accurate identity data to Finance Team.
Security monitoring MUST be tested to detect compromise of Finance Team within SLA.
Assumes that logs are retained for forensic investigation.

Concept_ID: INC-RESP.Containment Plan for ERP Web App
Concept_Description: Containment plan MUST be documented with steps for compromised ERP Web App.
Assumes that Finance Team logs cannot be tampered with by attackers.
Permission boundaries MUST be enforced for all service accounts accessing ERP Web App.
Assumes that DB accounts for Financial DB are scoped to specific tables.
JIT access MUST be validated via privilege escalation review for Finance Team.
Assumes that API keys for Finance Team are scoped to minimum operations required.
Assumes that security alerts are configured to detect attack patterns.
Alert response MUST be documented with escalation paths.
Anomaly detection MUST be tested to validate baseline deviations for Financial DB.
Log ingestion MUST be available to capture all events.

Concept_ID: NET-SEG.Firewall Rules for SOX Enclave isolation
Concept_Description: Firewall rules MUST be enforced to isolate SOX Enclave from untrusted networks.
Assumes that SOX Enclave is isolated at the workload level, not just perimeter.
Traffic filtering MUST be documented showing all allowed flows through Finance Team.
Network isolation MUST be tested for tenant isolation at SOX Enclave.
Assumes that physical access to Financial DB is restricted to authorized personnel.
Workstation security MUST be enforced to prevent unauthorized physical access.
Assumes that physical network ports for SOX Enclave are not publicly accessible.
Assumes that software dependencies used by Finance Team have no known vulnerabilities.
Image signing MUST be enforced to verify artifact signatures before deployment.
CI/CD integrity MUST be documented with traceable provenance for all artifacts.
Trusts that third-party components used by SOX Enclave are not malicious.
Third-party SLA MUST be available for ERP Web App to function as specified.
Trusts that third-party providers maintain security certifications.
Assumes that third-party SOX Enclave processes data in approved geographic regions.
Third-party access MUST be documented with data processing agreements.
